title: epipactis garganica
intro: Epipactis garganica, also known as the Spanish helleborine, is a type of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat coughs, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epipactis garganica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
